ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disaster_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disaster program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the disaster program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the disaster program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the disaster program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated to the disaster program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the disaster program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "representative" TEXT /* Name of the representative for the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster program */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding allocated to the district */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of total funding allocated to the district */,
  "running_percentage" TEXT /* Running percentage of cumulative funding allocated to the district */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was allocated */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding allocated */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES disaster_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_districts" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disaster program */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was requested */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  "affected_tables" TEXT /* List of tables affected by the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)
